mapper.select: select * from teacher_permission where deleted = 0 order by sort_order asc
select * from teacher_permission where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
select * from teacher_permission where permission_code = #{permissionCode} and deleted = 0
select * from teacher_permission where parent_id = #{parentId} and deleted = 0 order by sort_order asc
mapper.insert: insert into teacher_permission (permission_name, permission_code, permission_type, parent_id, path, icon, sort_order, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{permissionName}, #{permissionCode}, #{permissionType}, #{parentId}, #{path}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: update teacher_permission set permission_name = #{permissionName}, permission_code = #{permissionCode}, permission_type = #{permissionType}, parent_id = #{parentId}, path = #{path}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id}
update teacher_permission set deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
